note: Every domain of life mapped to its Aum house. Ignis uses this to route any query — no matter how specific — to the correct house for soul-routing and memory accumulation.

H1_IDENTITY.name: House Identity
domains: Identity & Heritage — gender, sexual orientation, ethnicity, culture, personal story
Psychology & Behavior — how you think, make decisions, process the world
Spirituality & Meaning — personal values, belief system, existential purpose
Self-concept & Personal Narrative — how you define and present yourself

H2_VALUES.name: House Values
domains: Economics & Financial Systems — personal finance, budgeting, wealth management
Safety & Security — personal safety, legal rights, emergency preparedness
Physical Health & Wellness — nutrition, fitness, body maintenance, functional ability
Nutrition & Food Systems — effect of food on health, food sourcing
Material Resources — what you own, build, and sustain

H3_VOICE.name: House Voice
domains: Linguistics & Language — communication structure, non-verbal communication
Education & Learning — knowledge acquisition, pedagogy, personal growth
Arts & Humanities (writing/literary) — literature, written expression
Media & Communication — how ideas travel between people
Information & Knowledge Systems — libraries, research, journalism

H4_HOME.name: House Home
domains: Real Estate & Shelter — housing, architecture, urban planning, land use
Intimate & Family — partnerships, parenting, deep biological or chosen kinship
Environmental & Citizenship — local community, civic duty, neighborhood
Safety & Security (home) — domestic safety, household systems
Cultural Heritage — traditions, ancestry, roots

H5_CREATION.name: House Creation
domains: Arts & Humanities — music, visual arts, performance, creative expression
Creative Expression — unique ways you output your internal world
Recreation & Leisure — hobbies, travel, personal enjoyment, adventure
Mathematics & Formal Sciences — abstract structures, formal systems, logic
Entertainment & Play — games, sport as play, joy-driven activity
Romance & Creative Partnership — early-stage connections, creative collaborations

H6_SERVICE.name: House Service
domains: Career & Employment — vocation, work environment, daily craft, productivity
Medical Science & Healthcare — prevention, diagnosis, treatment of disease
Physical Health (routine) — daily health practices, body maintenance
Service & Contribution — work done for others, craft, output
Animals & Zoology — animal care, working with animals
Systems & Processes — workflow, optimization, efficiency

H7_PARTNERSHIP.name: House Partnership
domains: Relationships & Intimacy — marriage, committed partnerships, deep bonds
Social & Community (close) — close friendships, mentors, key collaborators
Contracts & Agreements — legal partnerships, binding commitments
Open Enemies — known opposition, competitive relationships
Negotiation & Diplomacy — finding balance with others

H8_TRANSFORMATION.name: House Transformation
domains: Emotional Well-being — managing emotions, coping mechanisms, resilience
Mental Health & Cognitive Function — stress management, brain health
Sexual & Reproductive Health — reproductive system, deep biological cycles
Microbiology & Genetics — inheritance, microscopic biological change
Shared Resources & Finance — investments, debt, other people's money
Death & Regeneration — endings, transitions, deep transformation
Hidden Systems — taxes, insurance, inherited wealth

H9_PHILOSOPHY.name: House Philosophy
domains: Philosophy & Ethics — knowledge, reality, logic, ethics, love of wisdom
Spirituality & Meaning (universal) — religion, connecting to something larger
Astronomy & Space — celestial bodies, cosmos, outer space
History & Archeology — study of the past, human evolution, material remains
Anthropology & Human Diversity — past and present human societies, evolution
Higher Education — university, advanced learning, degrees
Long-distance Travel & Foreign Culture — exploring beyond the familiar
Law & Higher Principles — jurisprudence, moral law, justice systems

H10_LEGACY.name: House Legacy
domains: Politics & Governance — political systems, policies, power structures
Engineering & Technology — applying science to build tools and systems
Technology & Digital — hardware, software, internet, artificial intelligence
Career & Public Role — professional reputation, public identity, achievements
Sociology & Society (structural) — how power and systems shape societies
Vocation & Contribution — the legacy and impact you leave on the world

H11_COMMUNITY.name: House Community
domains: Sociology & Society — social behavior, social interactions, community structures
Environmental & Sustainability — resource management, conservation, ecology
Technology & Digital (networks) — internet, social platforms, collective digital life
Social Movements & Collective Goals — activism, group missions, shared futures
Friendships & Networks — social circles, professional communities, belonging
Innovation & Collective Vision — emerging ideas, future-building

H12_SUBCONSCIOUS.name: House Subconscious
domains: Physics & Matter — energy, force, light, heat, quantum mechanics, fundamental laws
Biology & Botany — plants, living organisms, ecosystems
Earth Science & Geology — planet's solid material, landforms, deep earth processes
Meteorology & Atmosphere — weather, climate, atmospheric systems
Oceanography & Hydrology — oceans, water movement, hydrological systems
Animals & Zoology (wild) — animal kingdom in its natural state
Microbiology & Mycology — bacteria, viruses, fungi, the hidden biological world
Ecology & Ecosystems — relationships between organisms and environments
The Unconscious Mind — dreams, hidden motivations, spiritual retreats
Institutions & Isolation — hospitals, prisons, monasteries, background systems
Hidden Enemies — unknown opposition, self-undoing patterns
